extensionDesc.message: Hover to zoom and view high-definition images. Instantly enlarge visuals, crafted for all your favourite websites—and for you.

extensionKeyboardShortcutDesc_toggle.message: Toggle PhotoShow on or off for the current site

contextMenuTitle__openImageInNewTab.message: Open HD image in new tab

globalMsg__COPY_IMAGE_ADDRESS__FAILURE.message: Failed to copy HD image address$error$, $retry$

globalMsg__EXPORT_SETTINGS_ERROR__NO_CUS.message: No custom settings found (defaults in use)

globalSettingsPrompt.message: The settings here are stored in your browser profile (synced across devices by default) and apply to all sites unless overridden by site-specific settings, which can be adjusted by visiting a site and clicking the PhotoShow icon in your browser toolbar.

siteSpecificSettingsPrompt.message: The settings here are stored locally in your browser (not synced across devices). Any changes will override the corresponding global settings and apply only to this site ().

photoShowEnabledMsg.message: PhotoShow is enabled on this site

photoShowDisabledMsg.message: PhotoShow is disabled on this site

photoShowNoAccessMsg.message: PhotoShow needs permission to access this site

photoShowSuspendedMsg.message: PhotoShow is suspended in developer mode

photoShowUnavailableMsg.message: PhotoShow cannot run on this site

stateToggleOnTitle.message: Click to disable PhotoShow on this site

stateToggleOffTitle.message: Click to enable PhotoShow on this site

whitelistModeToggleDesc.message: Enable PhotoShow only on specified sites (disabled by default for all sites)

viewerTriggerDesc.message: Select a modifier key to use in combination with mouse hover to show or hide the viewer, along with its usage mode and keyboard side:

viewerTriggerKeySideDesc.message: Keyboard side of the trigger key:

viewerExceptionsDesc.message: Do not display the viewer for:

viewerExceptionsOption_largeThumbnails.message: Thumbnails larger than 25% of the viewport

viewerExceptionsOption_wideThumbnails.message: Thumbnails wider than 50% of the viewport

viewerExceptionsOption_tallThumbnails.message: Thumbnails taller than 50% of the viewport

viewerExceptionsOption_smallInteractiveE.message: Small interactive elements (e.g., buttons, text fields)

viewerExceptionsCustomElementSelectorsPl.message: Enter CSS selectors (separate with commas or new lines, max $maxLength$ characters)

activationDelayDesc_before.message: Delay viewer display on thumbnail hover by

thumbnailTypesDesc.message: Display the viewer for the following types of thumbnails:

viewModesDesc.message: (For definitions of these view modes, please refer to the related section on the global settings page .)

viewModesOptionTitle_auto.message: The viewer resizes to fit available selected positions, maximising image size and enabling "scrolling mode" for ultra-wide or ultra-tall images

viewModesOptionTitle_fit.message: The viewer resizes to fit available selected positions, maximising image size while keeping full visibility with "scrolling mode" disabled

viewModesOptionTitle_lite.message: The viewer occupies up to 1/4 of the viewport and enables "scrolling mode" for ultra-wide or ultra-tall images

viewModesOptionTitle_mini.message: The viewer occupies up to 1/8 of the viewport and enables "scrolling mode" for ultra-wide or ultra-tall images

viewModesOptionTitle_panoramic.message: The viewer resizes to fit available selected positions, displaying images at original size while prioritising "scrolling mode" where applicable

viewerPositionsDesc.message: Allow the viewer to appear in the following positions relative to thumbnails:

imageInfoDisplayDesc.message: Show the following image information in the viewer:

newTabOpeningBehaviorOption_foreground.message: Open and switch to new HD image tabs

newTabOpeningBehaviorOption_background.message: Open new HD image tabs in background

hotkey__scrollImageByPage.message: PgUp / PgDnScroll the image up/down by page

hotkey__scrollImageToEnds.message: Home / EndScroll to the top/bottom of the image

hotkey__openImageInNewTab.message: TabOpen the HD image in a new tab

hotkey__switchViewMode.message: A / F / L / M / PSwitch view mode

hotkey__toggleViewMode.message: VToggle between the last two used view modes

imageSavingFilenamePatternDesc_imageCapt.message: Image caption (falls back to original file name if not available)

assistanceAndEnhancementsOption_crossOri.message: Allow cross-site image loading (risk information )

assistanceAndEnhancementsOption_thumbnai.message: Show a shade between the viewer and the source thumbnail

assistanceAndEnhancementsOption_overlapp.message: Hide the mouse cursor when it overlaps the viewer

assistanceAndEnhancementsOption_viewedIm.message: Mark viewed image links (risk information )

assistanceAndEnhancementsOption_viewedTh.message: Mark viewed image thumbnails (risk information )

assistanceAndEnhancementsOption_scrollin.message: Highlight previous screen when scrolling ultra-tall images by page
Preserve part of previous screen when scrolling ultra-tall images by page

usageDataCollectionDesc.message: Allow anonymous usage data collection to help improve PhotoShow (learn more )

developerModeDesc.message: Suspend PhotoShow in developer mode (when browser developer tools are open)

ensureGpuVideoEnhancementsDesc.message: Reduce performance impact by simplifying visual effects

transferSettingsDesc.message: Export custom settings for later use or import previously saved ones, including both global preferences and site-specific configurations

transferSettingsNewer.message: The imported settings are from a newer version of PhotoShow ($version$). Some options may not be recognised or supported. Updating to the latest version is recommended.

transferSettingsOlder.message: The imported settings are from an older or unknown version (exported on: $dateTime$). Export a new backup to keep it up to date.

resetSettingsDesc.message: Restore global preferences to default values or remove all site-specific configurations

logs__4_85_0.content: [{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added the official PhotoShow Discord community link to the Contact Author section."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Tailored for images on Future plc and SmugMug."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Tailored for designspiration.com, lemon8-app.com, mashable.com, mastodon.social, and vero.co."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Enhanced support for discord.com, douyin.com, google.com, and v.qq.com."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue that could cause PhotoShow to fail to initialise during page redirects."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue where the viewer could remain open after the pointer left the browser window."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Other improvements and bug fixes."}]

logs__4_84_0.content: [{"type":"improvement","desc":"Removed hotkey tooltips from context menu item labels when the corresponding shortcuts are not enabled (GitHub issue #290)."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Optimised the image detection mechanism (GitHub issue #291)."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Tailored for aucfan.com, meetup.com, netflix.com, and several other newly supported sites; enhanced support for some existing sites."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue that could cause image download failures in Gecko-based browsers (GitHub issue #292)."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Other improvements and bug fixes."}]

logs__4_83_3.content: [{"type":"improvement","desc":"Tailored for ok.ru and snapchat.com; enhanced for AliExpress and huaban.com (GitHub issue #289)."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue that could cause failures when retrieving HD image sources on certain sites (GitHub issue #287)."}]

logs__4_83_0.content: [{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added German localisation."},{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added Turkish localisation."},{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added a new \"Viewer Colour Scheme\" option: \"Match page\"."},{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added an option to allow cross-site image loading (GitHub issue #285)."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Various enhancements and improvements (GitHub issue #283)."}]

logs__4_82_0.content: [{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added French localisation with sincere thanks for the community’s contribution (GitHub issue #277)."},{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added Hebrew localisation."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Optimised styles for right-to-left (RTL) layouts."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Enhanced security for importing settings data (GitHub issue #278)."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Localised shortcut key and modifier key names for Portuguese and Spanish keyboard layouts."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed missing data in exported settings that caused import failures (GitHub issue #277)."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue where HTML-based user feedback email templates could not be properly parsed by some mail clients (GitHub issue #277)."}]

logs__4_81_0.content: [{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added Portuguese localisation."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Improved visibility of the thumbnail indicator against different page background colours (GitHub issue #270)."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Optimised the header styles on the extension pages."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue where the image information font size was affected by host page styles (GitHub issue #271)."},{"type": "bugFix", "desc": "Fixed an issue where the image viewer did not display for GIFs when the image size was smaller than the thumbnail (GitHub issue #273)."}]

logs__4_80_0.content: [{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added a new viewer trigger action mode \"Press only (toggle)\", along with its corresponding setting items (GitHub issue #269); updated settings version to 1.5.0.0."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Optimised performance by reducing system memory usage (GitHub issue #268)."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Improved detection of tiled CSS background images."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue that prevented detection of HD images loaded asynchronously on some sites."}]

logs__4_79_3.content: [{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue introduced in 4.79.1 that caused the \"View Modes\" settings to stop working (GitHub issue #266)."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed an issue where \"Viewer Positions\" settings did not persist after extension updates (GitHub issue #267)."}]

logs__4_79_1.content: [{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added Russian localisation."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Optimised layout and styles of the popup window."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Optimised behaviour of the image loading status indicator."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Improved detection of GitHub images (GitHub issue #265)."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Replaced file naming placeholders <I> → <c> and <O> → <o>; updated settings version to 1.4.1.0."}]

logs__4_78_0.content: [{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed user interaction conflicts between page frames (GitHub issue #260)."},{"type":"bugFix","desc":"Fixed exported settings date to use local time instead of UTC."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Enhanced viewer positioning algorithm for ultra-tall and ultra-wide images."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Improved thumbnail size calculation for SVG elements (GitHub issue #259)."},{"type":"improvement","desc":"Improved detection of tiled CSS background images."},{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added update log page."},{"type":"newFeature","desc":"Added Spanish localisation."}]
